metadata.title:
WANT DOUBLE DECKER


ACROSS HANCMAN CREEK

pages.raw_text:
Double deck the Portland & Sc
attle's line across Hangman creek.
is the slogan OF property owners
who live in the vicinity of the pres
ent wooden structure, which now
carries all the traffic to and from
the city and the fertile agricultural
belt to theh west. These property
owners will soon appear before the
council with a petition asking that
the council refuse tot grant the p.
4 s. franchise unless the company
agrees to share with the city and
the Washington Water Power Co.
In the cost of a new bridge.


The plans Of the new line as out
lined in the franchise application
are for bridge about 40 feet above
the level of the present wooden
bridge. 1t would be an easy mat
ter to build a double deck struc-
ture. say the property owners. 1t
